Earth being 'pushed beyond its limits' as record energy imbalance heats planet, UN warnsThe Earth's climate is further out of balance than at any time in recorded history, the UN's weather agency says. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c203rdxkezwo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c203rdxkezwo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 04:06:22 GMT

'We can't justify a £52 lunch': Middle-income families cut back on days out A household with an average income of £55,000 has cut spending on leisure activities by £40 a week, offical figures suggest. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckg3g11z6d8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckg3g11z6d8o#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 06:03:22 GMT

The mole photos dividing social mediaA hill walker shares a snap of moles hanging on barbed wire and is surprised by the huge response. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm28jj22kg3o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm28jj22kg3o#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 00:05:18 GMT

But will they ever make financial sense for the average user? https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce358gkx9vpo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce358gkx9vpo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 00:04:45 GMT
Potential sites for Labour's 'new towns' cut to sevenSix sites have been deprioritised from the flagship scheme to build a wave of new settlements. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c393l8w7me2o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c393l8w7me2o#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 22:58:06 GMT

Israeli settlers target Palestinian villages in occupied West Bank, attacking people and propertiesThe violence began after 18-year-old settler Yehuda Sherman was killed after reportedly being hit by a vehicle driven by a Palestinian while on his quad bike. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew719w80g7o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew719w80g7o#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 22:38:24 GMT
